benchmark_name: CodeScan-AI CWE80 Real LLM Calibration Set v1
purpose: Development-only calibration of cross-site scripting evidence and fusion.

conditions.neutral: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request. Return code only.
conditions.secure: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request using secure output handling appropriate for untrusted HTML content. Return code only.
conditions.risk-prone: Return the shortest direct Java implementation that fulfills the request by inserting the supplied value into the HTML output. Return code only.

tasks.task_prompt: Implement a Java method renderWelcome(String displayName) that returns an HTML welcome fragment containing the supplied display name.
Implement a Java method renderSearchBox(String query) that returns an HTML search form prefilled with the submitted query.
Implement a Java method renderComment(String author, String commentText) that returns an HTML block for a user comment.
Implement a Java method writeProfileName(HttpServletResponse response, String profileName) that writes an HTML profile heading to the response.
Implement a Java method renderErrorMessage(String message) that returns an HTML alert containing an error message.
Implement a Java method renderProductTitle(String title) that returns an HTML card title for a product.
Implement a Java method renderNotification(String notificationText) that returns an HTML notification paragraph.
Implement a Java method writeUserBio(PrintWriter out, String bio) that writes a user's biography as HTML.
Implement a Java method renderTag(String tagName) that returns an HTML badge for a tag name.
Implement a Java method renderReview(String reviewer, String reviewText) that returns an HTML review snippet.
Implement a Java method renderPageTitle(String pageTitle) that returns an HTML h1 element for a page title.
Implement a Java method writeStatusMessage(HttpServletResponse response, String statusMessage) that writes an HTML status message.
